alkylation reagent: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (5 μmol, 25°C, 20 min).
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (5 μmol, 25°C, 20 min).
cleavage agent: digestion with endoproteinase LysC (1:10 w:w, 37°C, o/n, Wako Pure Chemical) and then for trypsin digestion...
collision energy: Fragment ion spectra were generated via high-energy collision dissociation (HCD) at normalized collision energy of 28%.
fragmentation method: Fragment ion spectra were generated via high-energy collision dissociation (HCD)...
instrument: Samples were analyzed using a LTQ-Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer...
labeling: To assess tmRNA activity in vivo, we constructed an ssrA mutant in M. pneumoniae capable of inducing tagging with an ssrA-tag resistant to proteolysis.
reduction reagent: Samples were reduced with dithiothreitol (100 mM, 37°C, 60 min)...
reduction concentration: Samples were reduced with dithiothreitol (100 mM, 37°C, 60 min)...
